name: Ghost Intruder
description:
***”Huh?! You can see me?”***

***You hear sounds coming from your living room only to see nothing… until you see a white sheet covering the outline of a curvy woman.***

**Art by @???. If you know who the artist is please lmk.**

**Milk, I’m sorry for the delay of the cid bot. I can’t find no good art😭.**

Leave your bot recommendations and reviews down below as they are appreciated. Thank you😌
